components.text:
/sect deposit is a command that is extremely important to keep your claims yours!

 In the next page I will explain how much each item gives your in Power. 

Items = Power and if you put in an item in the /sect deposit that can't go in there then it will be given back to you when you close the Gui!

Copper Ingot = 1 Power

Iron Ingot = 2 Power

Gold Ingot = 2 Power

Diamond = 4 Power

Emerald = 5 Power

Netherite Ingot = 6 Power

Frost Silver Ingot = 3 Power

Black Iron Ingot = 3 Power

Jade = 4 Power

Spiritual Stone = 16 Power
